critic.summary: Fast mode skips critic, continuity, editor, and voting. Pass --deep-review to enable critic and editor review.

editor.final_summary: When the ledger’s ink turns to liquid glass, the orchard’s roots pulse with a new, unsettling light, and the agents’ pasts begin to bleed into the present.
unresolved_threads: Elisa’s memory wipe causes a ripple in the orchard’s new bloom; Mara’s revealed sibling name sets up a betrayal in the next chapter.
